label: medium
description: Historically significant events with moderate documentation — requires deeper knowledge and temporal precision

tasks.query: Treaty of Westphalia ends the Thirty Years War October 24 1648
tasks.notes: Important but requires European history knowledge

tasks.query: Krakatoa volcanic eruption destroys most of the island August 27 1883
Tunguska event flattens 2150 square kilometers of Siberian forest June 30 1908
French soldiers discover the Rosetta Stone at Fort Julien in Egypt July 15 1799
Alan Turing publishes On Computable Numbers introducing the Turing machine 1936
tasks.notes: Publication date known, exact month less common

tasks.query: Joseph Murray performs first successful human kidney transplant in Boston December 23 1954
Stonewall riots begin at the Stonewall Inn Greenwich Village June 28 1969
tasks.notes: Important but exact date less universally known

tasks.query: Voyager 1 captures the Pale Blue Dot photograph from 6 billion kilometers February 14 1990
ENIAC the first general-purpose electronic computer is unveiled at UPenn February 14 1946
tasks.notes: Computing history, specific date less common

tasks.query: Grigori Perelman publishes proof of the Poincare conjecture on arXiv November 2002
The Antonine Plague begins devastating the Roman Empire in 165 AD
Battle of Thermopylae between Greek forces and Persian Empire August 480 BC
Zheng He departs Nanjing on first maritime expedition with 317 ships in 1405
Johannes Gutenberg prints the first Bible using movable type in Mainz circa 1455
tasks.notes: Exact year debated within a small range

tasks.query: Edward Jenner vaccinates James Phipps against smallpox May 14 1796
tasks.notes: Medical milestone, specific date in historical record

tasks.query: Nikola Tesla demonstrates wireless energy transmission at Colorado Springs laboratory 1899
First transatlantic telegraph cable completed between Ireland and Newfoundland August 5 1858
tasks.notes: Specific date, but cable failed after 3 weeks

tasks.query: Scientists demonstrate CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing in human cells for the first time February 2013
Great Fire of London destroys 13200 houses over four days beginning September 2 1666
Galileo Galilei first observes four moons of Jupiter through telescope January 7 1610
tasks.notes: Date from Galileo's own records, Julian calendar
